title: taraxacum martellense
intro: Taraxacum martellense, also known as Martell's dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion genus. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum martellense include its ability to support liver function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Taraxacum martellense is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be found in capsule or powder form for herbal supplements, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
